templates.title: Arduino Mega Shield
templates.description: This project template is the basis of an expansion board for the Arduino Mega 2560 . It includes a PCB edge matching the outline of the Arduino Mega 2560 Rev3 PCB with connectors and mounting holes placed correctly to align the two boards.

templates.title: Arduino Micro
templates.description: This template forms the basis for a board with the same layout as an Arduino Micro , including the appropriate board outline, header locations, and annotations denoting the location of the USB port, reset button, and ICSP header.

templates.title: Arduino Nano
templates.description: This template forms the basis for a board with the same layout as the Arduino Nano , including the appropriate board outline, header locations, and annotations denoting the location of the USB and ICSP header.

templates.title: Arduino Pro Mini
templates.description: This template forms the basis for a board with the same layout as the Arduino Pro Mini , including the appropriate board outline and header locations.

templates.title: Arduino Uno Shield
templates.description: This project template is the basis of an expansion board for the Arduino Uno Rev3 . It includes a PCB edge matching the outline of the Arduino Uno PCB with connectors and mounting holes placed correctly to align the two boards.

templates.title: BeagleBone Black Cape
templates.description: This project template is the basis of an expansion board for the BeagleBone Black .

templates.title: EuroCard - 160mm x 100mm
templates.description: This project template provides the outline of a standard 3U EuroCard measuring 160mm by 100mm. This design is based on IEEE Std 1101.1-1998 , and has keepout zones for the mounting rails (optional) mounting holes placed appropriately. Note that the IEEE standard also includes a 3x32 DIN41612 Type C connector (Connector

templates.title: Hammond 1593K Enclosure
templates.description: This project template is the basis of a PCB that fits inside a Hammond Manufacturing 1593K Enclosure .

templates.title: Raspberry Pi HAT
templates.description: This project template forms the basis of an expansion board (HAT) for the Raspberry Pi single board computers with a 40-pin GPIO header. This includes the following models: Pi 1 Model A+/B+ Pi 2 Model B Pi 3 Model A+/B/B+ Pi 4 Model B

templates.title: Raspberry Pi uHAT
templates.description: This project template forms the basis of an expansion board (HAT) for the Raspberry Pi single board computers with a 40-pin GPIO header. This includes the following models: Pi Zero Pi Zero W

templates.title: STM32 Discovery
templates.description: STM32 Value Line Discovery - STM32F100 Cortex-M3™ Microcontroller Board Expansion Board This project is a template of an expansion board for the STM32 Value Line Discovery board. templates.title: TI LaunchPad BoosterPack
templates.description: This template forms the basis of a PCB compatible with the Texas Instruments BoosterPack specification; compatible with the TI LaunchPad family of development boards. The PCB includes the required headers and the a LaunchPad compatibility logo provided by TI. This is the 20-pin variant, used on some of the smaller MSP4

templates.title: TI LaunchPad BoosterPack
templates.description: This template forms the basis of a PCB compatible with the Texas Instruments BoosterPack specification; compatible with the TI LaunchPad family of development boards.
